item.title: When is the next results date for CRISIL Ltd.?
item.description: The next results date for CRISIL Ltd. is 16 April 2026. Time: Apr 02 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Swaraj Engines Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Swaraj Engines Ltd is April 13, 2026. Time: Apr 02 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Jindal Leasefin Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Jindal Leasefin Ltd is April 8, 2026. Time: Apr 02 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: Laurus Labs Added to MomentumNow Stocks on Strong Financial Momentum
item.description: Laurus Labs, a prominent mid-cap player in the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector, has been newly added to the MomentumNow Stocks list as of 2 April 2026, reflecting its robust financial performance and strong momentum. This inclusion highlights the company’s exceptional quarterly growth and strategic fit within a portfolio focused on capitalising on market momentum. Time: Apr 02 2026 08:30 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Bandhan Bank Ltd. — On a Day the Stock Fell 1.02%. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Bandhan Bank Ltd., signalling a golden cross on 2 Apr 2026. Yet, the stock declined 1.02% on the same day, while monthly technical indicators remain mixed. This divergence between the moving averages and price action calls for a closer examination of the signal’s reliability. Time: Apr 02 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Dr Reddys Laboratories Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Dr Reddys Laboratories Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 2 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical landscape presents a nuanced picture, with some indicators supporting the crossover while others suggest caution. Time: Apr 02 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Veerhealth Care Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Veerhealth Care Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 2 Apr 2026. While this technical event often suggests a shift towards bullish momentum, the broader technical and fundamental context must be examined to assess the signal's reliability. Time: Apr 02 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Schneider Electric Infrastructure Ltd — Mixed Technical Signals and Strong Momentum
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Schneider Electric Infrastructure Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 2 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical picture is nuanced, with weekly indicators mostly bullish but monthly momentum showing mild bearishness. This cross arrives amid strong recent gains, raising questions about whether the signal is confirming an ongoing rally or standing alone against mixed signals. Time: Apr 02 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Pokarna Ltd — On a Day the Stock Barely Moved. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Pokarna Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 2 Apr 2026. Yet, the stock’s price was essentially flat on the day, and the broader technical indicators paint a conflicted picture. This divergence invites a deeper look into whether the signal carries conviction or is merely a technical artefact. Time: Apr 02 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Aditya Vision Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Aditya Vision Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development highlights a deterioration in the stock’s medium-term momentum and raises concerns about sustained weakness in the retailing sector stock’s price trajectory. Time: Apr 02 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Garment Mantra Lifestyle Ltd — On a Day the Stock Fell 1.36%. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Garment Mantra Lifestyle Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 2 Apr 2026. Yet, the stock declined 1.36% on the day the cross formed, while monthly technical indicators remain mixed. This divergence between the moving averages and price action calls for a deeper examination of the signal’s reliability. Time: Apr 02 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Ausom Enterprise Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Ausom Enterprise Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Gems, Jewellery And Watches sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a technical pattern where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development is widely regarded as a bearish signal, indicating a potential deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term trend and signalling caution for investors. Time: Apr 02 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Meghna Infracon Infrastructure Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Meghna Infracon Infrastructure Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness in the Realty sector micro-cap. Time: Apr 02 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Baid Finserv Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals and Modest Price Movement
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Baid Finserv Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, creating a golden cross on 2 Apr 2026. However, the daily price change was a modest 0.20%, and the broader technical indicators present a mixed picture, raising questions about the strength of this signal. Time: Apr 02 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: IZMO Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: IZMO Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-DMA. This technical development is widely regarded as a bearish signal, indicating a potential deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term trend and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: Apr 02 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Ashiana Housing Ltd. Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals and Steady Fundamentals
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Ashiana Housing Ltd. has crossed above the 200-day moving average, signalling a golden cross on 2 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical landscape is nuanced, with weekly and monthly indicators sending mixed messages. This divergence invites a closer look at whether the golden cross stands as a reliable signal or a lone beacon amid uncertainty. Time: Apr 02 2026 06:00 PM IST
